title: Maximum XOR of two numbers in an array

content.problemStatement: Given an integer array nums, return the maximum result of nums[i] XOR nums[j], where 0 <= i <= j < n.
content.outputFormat: The maximum result of nums[i] XOR nums[j], where 0 <= i <= j < n

solution.approach: Using a Trie to store the binary representation of the numbers and then finding the maximum XOR for each number
